title: cicerbita variabilis
intro: Cicerbita variabilis is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is also known as variable toothwort or variable hawk's beard. Traditionally, Cicerbita variabilis has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Cicerbita variabilis can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile herb for traditional herbal remedies.
